name: hakim
description: Evidence-bound minimalist coding intelligence for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Hakim guides Codex toward smaller, safer changes: reuse first, stdlib before dependencies, native platform features before custom code, and explicit technical-debt notes for deliberate shortcuts.
defaultPrompt: Use Hakim to review this change for unnecessary code and dependency bloat.
Use Hakim in full mode and propose the smallest safe implementation.
